$comment: Example MCP client registration. Easiest: run `meshtastic-mcp install` (registers this automatically + installs skills); `meshtastic-mcp uninstall` removes it. Or copy this into ~/.claude.json (user scope) or a project .mcp.json. `uvx` gives a zero-install run. To enable the firmware capability (build/flash), add env MESHTASTIC_FIRMWARE_ROOT pointing at a firmware checkout.
